description.from: Targets the ally with the lowest HP and allies nearby to heal ??? HP. Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies near the target, and reduces enemy ATK Spd by 25% for 10 sec.
description.to: Heals the ally with the lowest current HP and nearby allies for 3478*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 564.5% ATK HP, deals 328*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 205.3% ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies, and reduces their ATK Spd by 25% for 10 sec.

description.from: Deals ??? M.DMG, inflicts knockback, and shackles the target enemy for 6 sec. Enemies inflicted by shackle take 25% increased M.DMG while the effect lasts.
description.to: Deals 713*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 453.2% ATK M.DMG to an enemy, knocks them back, roots them for 6 sec, and increases M.DMG taken by 25% for 6 sec.

description.from: Grants Invincibility to all allies for 7 sec and heals ??? HP for the duration of skill.
description.to: Grants all allies Invincibility for 7 sec and restores HP by 394*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 64% ATK every 1 sec.

description.from: Each attack has a 20% chance of dealing ??? M.DMG to target and inflicting stun for 1.5 sec.
description.to: On hit, has a 20% chance to deal 368*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 231.2% ATK M.DMG to the target and stun them for 0.9 sec.

light.to: If there is only 1 enemy, damage dealt is increased by 100%.

dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but the number of targets is increased by 3.

light.from: Invincibility duration is increased by 1.5 sec.

dark.from: In exchange for 2 additional Mana Cost and a 3 sec reduction of Invincibility duration, all allies gain 50% ATK.
dark.to: Mana cost is increased by 3000 and Invincibility duration is reduced by 3 sec, but all allies’ Attack is increased by 50% for 10 sec and cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.
Maximum Attack increase stacks are increased by 5.

description.from: [Spear of Light] Gains Immunity to CC for the skill's duration and increases M.Weakness of the target by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Spear of Light] Gains Immunity to CC for the skills duration and increases M.Weakness of the target by {0}% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Holy Sanctuary] ATK is increased by 25% for the duration of skill, and recovers {0} Mana per sec.
description.to: [Holy Sanctuary] Increases ATK by 25% and recovers {0} Mana every sec for the duration of Skill.

description.from: Increasing the casting speed of all skills, and upon every skill use, increases ATK by {0}% and DEF by {1}%. This effect can stack up to 7 times.
description.to: Increases own Skill activation speed, and each time a skill is used, increases all allies' ATK by {0}% and M.DEF by {1}%. This effect stacks up to 7 times.

description.from: Summons the soul of God's Book, Genesis, increasing the number of targets of normal attacks to 2 for 10 sec, healing HP of all allies by ??? and dispelling negative effects every 2 sec.
description.to: Summons the soul of God’s Book, Genesis for 10sec, increasing the number of targets of Normal Attacks to 2. Every 2sec, heals all allies for 400% of ATK and dispels negative effects.

1.from: Changes Skill Activation requirements of Soul Weapon to 4.
1.to: Changes Skill Activation Requirements of the Soul Weapon to 4.
